top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EU readies crisis team for China rare earths stand-off
top_signals.summary: Crisis team will prepare for possible trade conflict when truce expires in October
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK entry to EU loan scheme for Ukraine is ‘template’ for future deals, says bloc envoy
top_signals.summary: Pedro Serrano tells FT that London and Brussels are in ‘the phase of winning’, 10 years on from Brexit vote
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman’s Ruemmler to testify to Congress about Epstein ties
top_signals.summary: Lawyer is latest ex-Wall Street executive to be grilled over links to late child sex offender
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Airtel Africa taps more bankers for rare London IPO of mobile money business
top_signals.summary: Flotation could raise around $1.5bn and provide a much-needed boost for the UK’s depressed public markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indian capital promotes EVs to tackle severe air pollution
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Is the US or Europe better off?
top_signals.summary: Comparing the two economies is harder than it seems

top_signals.title: As good as it gets in banking?
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks have unveiled record quarterly profits but risks loom

top_signals.title: BlackRock assets rise to record $15.3tn
top_signals.summary: Second-quarter net income at US-based asset manager jumped 20% to $1.9bn amid capital markets boom

top_signals.title: A new economic order will be built piece by ad hoc piece
top_signals.summary: Traditional trade deals will not address geopolitical concerns

top_signals.title: LA is a superb museum city — and easier to navigate than you think
top_signals.summary: The city’s collections of art and artefacts are world-class, as are the buildings that house them

alerts.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
alerts.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
alerts.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
